title: The operator plane
meta: The operator's runbook in real transitions: EchoMQ.Admin pauses the whole queue as a separate gate (a paused field the claim reads, so the claim script never changes), drains the backlog while the active set and the repeat cadence survive, and obliterates a paused queue bounded by a budget. The per-job verbs on EchoMQ.Jobs replace payload, write progress (with a PUBLISH on the events channel), append logs, remove, and reprocess — each a fenced, typed transition.
